items.title: At least 82 dead in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
items.dek: The explosion took place at 19:29 local time on Friday at a coal mine in northern China.
items.body: The explosion took place at 19:29 local time on Friday at a coal mine in northern China.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rubio visits India to sell energy as Iran oil shock persists
items.dek: The top US diplomat has made statements offering to support India’s energy needs - but should Delhi give in?
items.body: The top US diplomat has made statements offering to support India’s energy needs - but should Delhi give in?
